title: Shippie app manifest (shippie.json)
description: The maker-facing manifest that turns a build into a Shippie tool. Identity + capabilities + data + source/provenance. The deploy pipeline reads a lenient subset (ShippieJsonLite in apps/platform/src/lib/server/deploy/manifest.ts); this schema documents the full maker surface. additionalProperties is permitted so richer showcase manifests validate.

icon.description: Path to an icon within the bundle, e.g. /icon-512.png.

theme_color.description: CSS color; drives the address-bar / splash tint.

kind.description: Maker-declared kind. Detection is public truth; declared kind is private.

ai.description: Local AI task types the tool uses, e.g. ['classify','embed']. Runs on-device via WebGPU/WASM.

offline.description: Tool works after first load with no network.

permissions.description: Declared capabilities. Anything not declared is denied by the wrapper/CSP.

external_network.description: If true, allowed_connect_domains must enumerate every host.

allowed_connect_domains.description: Explicit allowlist of outbound hosts. Empty/absent = no external connections (local-first default).

intents.description: Cross-tool intent wiring. See @shippie/intents CANONICAL_INTENTS for the catalog.

source_repo.description: Provenance: source URL (e.g. a GitHub repo or tree URL). Normalized server-side; only http(s) accepted.

source_commit.description: Provenance: exact commit SHA this build came from. Pin a build to a commit, not just a branch.

license.description: SPDX license id. Required (with source_repo) for remix_allowed to take effect.

remix_allowed.description: Opt-in: allow others to fork/clone + redeploy with lineage preserved.

parent_app_id.description: Lineage: the app this was remixed from. An app may not be its own parent.
